General.Name: EML Payments Ltd
General.Description: EML Payments Limited provides payment solutions platform in Australia, Europe, and North America. It offers reloadable and non-reloadable prepaid payment solutions; prepaid payment solutions services; and undertakes provision of prepaid payment services predominantly with single load card solutions. The company also provides credit payments, open banking, digital account payments solutions. The company was formerly known as Emerchants Limited. EML Payments Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.

9.Name: Mr. Adam R. Olding B.Ec., CSP, FCIS, Grad Dip, LLB (Hons), MA
9.Title: CEO of Australia, UK & Europe
